query:
UPDATE projects p
SET p.matchedBusinessLines = JSON_ARRAY_APPEND(p.matchedBusinessLines, '$', 90002)
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
AND p.lifecycleStatus NOT IN ('stale', 'cancelled', 'completed')
AND NOT JSON_CONTAINS(p.matchedBusinessLines, '90002')
AND (
  p.overview LIKE '%booster%' OR p.overview LIKE '%dryer%' OR p.overview LIKE '%air treatment%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%instrument air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%high pressure air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%high-pressure air%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%pre-commission%' OR p.overview LIKE '%pipeline drying%' OR p.overview LIKE '%pipeline dry%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%CDR%' OR p.overview LIKE '%nitrogen%' OR p.overview LIKE '%FPSO%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%LNG%' OR p.overview LIKE '%oil-free%' OR p.overview LIKE '%oil free%'
  OR p.overview LIKE '%breathing air%' OR p.overview LIKE '%dew point%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%booster%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%dryer%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%air treatment%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%instrument air%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%high pressure%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%pre-commission%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%pipeline dry%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%CDR%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%nitrogen%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%350 psi%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%500 psi%'
  OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%breathing air%' OR p.opportunityNote LIKE '%dew point%'
);
